footer.subtitle: Open Social Innovation
footer.description: Social technologies portal of the Universidade Federal Fluminense. An initiative of the Innovation Agency (AGIR/PROPPI/UFF).
footer.copyright: © 2026 LISA Portal · UFF · AGIR · All rights reserved
footer.version: MVP Version 1.0 · Built in Niterói, RJ

hero.description: The Open Social Innovation Laboratory gathers, documents and connects social innovation initiatives developed within and beyond the Universidade Federal Fluminense.
hero.caption: Match your real demand with social technologies already developed by UFF's university community.

apresentacao.label: About
apresentacao.paragraph1: Social technologies are products, methods and processes developed in interaction with the community, responding to concrete demands and reapplicable in different contexts.
apresentacao.paragraph2: LISA Portal is the meeting point between those who develop these initiatives and those seeking innovative solutions to real problems — strengthening the social function of the public university.

demanda.title: Concrete demand
demanda.description: The initiative is born from a real problem, identified together with the benefited community.

construcao.title: Collective construction
construcao.description: The community is co-author, not just user. Knowledge is built together.

reaplicabilidade.title: Reapplicability
reaplicabilidade.description: The solution can be adapted — not copied — to new contexts and realities.

timeline.label: Trajectory
timeline.description: Six decades of history, from the birth of UFF to the launch of LISA Portal. Keep scrolling to navigate the timeline.

block1.label: Coordination
block1.title: AGIR / PROPPI
block1.description: UFF's Innovation Agency, linked to the Pro-Rectorate of Research, Graduate Studies and Innovation, coordinates LISA Portal as part of its mission to promote the social function of the university.

block2.label: LISA's Mission
block2.title: Open Innovation
block2.description: Connect those who develop social technologies with those seeking solutions, strengthening knowledge networks and amplifying the impact of university initiatives.
